title: KRCL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Assistant Materials Manager Posts
description: The Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Materials Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Mechanical, Civil Engineering, PGDM, and MBA can apply for the KRCL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have ...
